last_item: Band C: Modal → shadcn Dialog. Recomposed the hand-rolled Modal({open,title,onClose,children,footer,tone,width}) over shadcn Dialog/DialogContent/DialogHeader/DialogTitle/DialogFooter, keeping the exact public API so all ~10 callsites (Alerts ×2, Migrate ×3, Backups ×1, RolesDatabases ×4, ConfirmDialog ×2) stay untouched. Radix now owns focus trap / Escape / backdrop dismiss / focus restore. width→sm:max-w-md|xl|3xl; tone=danger→ring-destructive/30 + data-tone; busy-noop onClose keeps it open via controlled open overriding onOpenChange. Body scrolls in an inner max-h-[65vh] overflow-y-auto wrapper so the pinned close button isn't clipped; aria-describedby={undefined} to drop Radix's dangling description ref. Deleted dead .modal* CSS + orphaned @keyframes fade/pop (kept .confirm-message). Modal.tsx remains a thin Dialog shell — full per-callsite decomposition + .btn→Button deferred to band D/E view migrations.
last_result: green: typecheck, 95 web tests, build, go build (outside sandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). ui-heuristics-reviewer flagged two blocking regressions, both fixed: (1) overflow-y-auto on DialogContent scrolls the absolute close button out of view → moved scroll to an inner wrapper around children only; (2) Radix auto aria-describedby with no DialogDescription → aria-describedby={undefined}. Benign dev-only Radix 'function components cannot be given refs' warning from the generated dialog.tsx (not a failure). Next in band C: ConfirmDialog→AlertDialog, then Toast→sonner. Deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft (logged in backlog).
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
